note: Web wallet now tracks in-flight UTXOs to stop the 'two clicks on Send within seconds re-pick the same UTXOs' double-spend pattern. New module-level Map<"txid:vout", {ts, broadcast_txid, address}>; persisted in localStorage under sost_wallet_inflight, scoped per wallet address. (1) On unlock and on Restore Wallet, _inflightLoad() rehydrates the Map from localStorage and drops entries older than IN_FLIGHT_TTL_MS (5 min). (2) sendTransaction and sendTransactionMany now filter the candidate UTXO list with _filterInflight() before building, so the second Send within the same second cannot re-pick UTXOs that the previous broadcast already used. (3) After sendrawtransaction OK both paths call _inflightAdd(selectedUtxos, txid) and trigger a non-blocking refreshBalance() so the UI catches up. (4) On broadcast failure (network or node-side), _inflightRelease(selectedUtxos) frees the reservations immediately so the user can retry without an artificial 60 s wait. (5) refreshBalance now calls _inflightReconcile(freshUtxos) which drops reservations whose UTXOs the node no longer reports — the standard 'spent / minted away' path. (6) A 60 s safety timer drops any single batch of reservations even if no refresh comes. (7) lockWallet wipes the in-process Map but keeps the localStorage entry (5 min TTL) so a quick relock-unlock does not lose state. NO consensus, NO RPC schema, NO node, NO miner. Pure wallet-side accounting.
